comment: 3D-generation engine registry. Built-ins always ship with the app; the big engines light up only when SCS_ENGINES_DIR points at a directory holding their venvs + weights (the pod archive restored onto a >=16 GB GPU machine). VRAM gating keeps under-spec machines from selecting something that would crash them. Stable Fast 3D is deliberately absent: Stability Community License caps commercial use at $1M revenue - benchmark-only, see docs/HUGGINGFACE_MODEL_NARROWING.md.

engines.label: Detailed — new 3D model
engines.notes: The built-in generator + repair packs. Runs on any PC; an NVIDIA GPU with 4+ GB makes it fast.

engines.label: Fast — from catalog
engines.notes: Retrieval from the 929-mesh ABO catalog — instant, deterministic, the measured quality ceiling.

engines.label: TripoSG — benchmark champion (F-score 0.393)
engines.notes: Best measured generator in the 5-AI study. Needs a 16 GB GPU and the engines pack installed.

engines.label: TRELLIS.2-4B — Microsoft, newest
engines.notes: Microsoft's 2026 successor to TRELLIS. Needs a 24 GB GPU and the engines pack installed.

engines.label: SAM 3D — Meta (F-score 0.368)
engines.notes: Benchmark runner-up; wins cabinets/boxy shapes. Needs a 24 GB GPU and the engines pack installed.
